signals.headline: Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 202
signals.raw:
Solana Hits All-Time Record 167 Million Monthly Token Holders & 148 Million Daily Non-Vote Transactions on April 14, 2026, Fueled by Alpenglow Upgrade** | YES | HIGH  
Alpenglow consensus upgrade confirmed to slash transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds, driving network surge and institutional holdings by BlackRock/Fidelity.[1]

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse in Pakistan; Trump Announces Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH confidence*
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Talks Collapse in Pakistan; Trump Announces Naval Blockade of Strait of Hormuz | NO | HIGH confidence**  
US-Iran negotiations mediated in Pakistan ended without agreement on April 13, 2026, primarily due to Iran's refusal to abandon nuclear ambitions, prompting President Trump to order a US Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz to curb Iranian oil exports and ships.[1]
